home.subtitle: The first platform that teaches you European Portuguese from any language or dialect you speak. AI-powered, human-supported.

universal_input.title: The Universal Input
universal_input.subtitle: Learning from Irish? Irish Gaelic? Mandarin? Just type it. Our AI bridges the gap.

reviews.name: Nadja
reviews.quote: Nuno is an amazing tutor, he adapts the lessons to the students needs and is very helpful.

reviews.name: Claudia
reviews.quote: Nuno is an exceptional teacher who is accelerating my Portuguese learning. His fun and effective method is boosting my confidence and skills.

reviews.name: Chloe
reviews.quote: I LOVE learning with Nuno. He is smart, funny, and his classes are really interesting. I feel like I learn a lot and the 50 minutes fly by each time. I feel confident learning with him.

reviews.name: Fabian
reviews.quote: Nuno is a great teacher, he's patient and is happy to tailor each lesson to what we need. His knowledge on languages is vast and he explains everything clearly with examples.

reviews.name: Kelsey
reviews.quote: Nuno's classes are easy to understand and he really caters toward your needs an ability level. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.name: Jacob
reviews.quote: Nuno is a great tutor; he really listens to his students and, through that, becomes a better tutor than lots of others.

reviews.name: Erek
reviews.quote: Excellent for casual speak on day to day scenario with verb structure and review. Nice guy and down to earth easy to relate.

reviews.name: Alasdair
reviews.quote: Nuno is a great teacher. He's very patient and willing to adapt to the students needs. He has lots of knowledge and is capable of explaining things very clearly.

reviews.name: Ludovic
reviews.quote: Perfect!

reviews.name: Nia
reviews.quote: Nuno is a dedicated teacher who addresses individual needs and takes a practical approach.

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.quote: Very personable.

reviews.name: Jade
reviews.quote: I like the personalised approach Nuno takes in his classes. He goes at the tempo you need/want without adding too much pressure.

reviews.name: Ludovica
reviews.quote: Nuno is a great teacher. He is patient and really focused on your needs. I noticed progress after just a few lessons. Our lessons are a mix of reading, grammar, and writing, which makes them very complete.

reviews.name: Andrew
reviews.quote: Working with Nuno has been great. I'm already making noticeable progress after just two lessons. Looking forward to the next one!

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.quote: I have been learning Portuguese with Nuno and it has been an excellent experience! He is patient, smart and takes the time to personalize the learning.

reviews.name: George
reviews.quote: Nuno's approach to teaching is fantastic, engaging and interesting. He provides clear, helpful guidance and explanations in a relaxed and informal way.

reviews.name: Philipp
reviews.quote: I started my Preply journey with Nuno and I am very happy with our classes. He is a fun guy with whom you can talk easily about your daily life and hobbies.

reviews.name: Charles
reviews.quote: Making great progress on my Portuguese! Highly recommend Nuno for starting, he does a great job getting you comfortable with the basics.

reviews.name: Sh
reviews.quote: It's a clear and nice lessons, he have patience and have fun with the lessons.

reviews.name: Laura
reviews.quote: Nuno is very patient. He is able to explain words and meanings so that it makes sense.

reviews.name: Hlib
reviews.quote: Nuno is an excellent Portuguese tutor. He explains everything clearly, making it easy to follow along. Especially for those working in IT.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.quote: Very fun to talk to.

reviews.name: Yegane
reviews.quote: Nuno is a fantastic teacher, and I highly recommend him. His kind demeanour quickly put me at ease with portuguese language.

reviews.name: Rosa
reviews.quote: He has a lot of patience and is very encouraging!

reviews.name: Angie
reviews.quote: Nuno is an amazing tutor, both friendly and knowledgeable. From the first session, his welcoming nature made learning fun and easy.

reviews.name: Josep
reviews.quote: Nuno is an exceptional Portuguese teacher. His classes are always dynamic and engaging. Thanks to his friendly personality and patience, each lesson is very pleasant.

reviews.name: Isobelle
reviews.quote: Thank you very much Nuno, my classes are very fun and interesting.

reviews.name: Bas
reviews.quote: Today I had my first class with Nuno, it was very pleasant, he has a lot of patience. He gave me a very funny homework assignment.

home.how_it_works_step1_desc: Speak English, Thai, or Aussie slang? We start from where YOU are.
home.how_it_works_step2_desc: No rigid lessons. Ask how to order a "bifana" or flirt in Lisbon naturally.
home.how_it_works_step3_desc: Download custom cheat sheets and practice with our 24/7 voice tutor.
home.final_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of learners mastering real-world Portuguese today.

faqs.question: Is this strictly European Portuguese?
faqs.answer: 100%. We built this specifically because every other app defaults to Brazilian Portuguese. No 'você' here unless we're being strictly formal!

faqs.question: Do I need to know English to use this?
faqs.answer: Nope! Multi Lingo AI is powered by an engine that translates and explains concepts using ANY starting language or dialect you provide.

faqs.question: Can I talk to a real human?
faqs.answer: Yes! While our AI tutor is available 24/7, you can easily schedule live sessions with verified human tutors through our Smart Scheduler.

faqs.question: What makes Multi Lingo AI different?
faqs.answer: We focus on real, conversational Portuguese with authentic slang and expressions. No textbook language here—just practical, everyday communication.

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible pricing plans starting with a free tier. Premium plans unlock unlimited AI conversations and live tutor sessions.

faqs.question: Can I try it for free?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can use our free tier to explore all features. Most learners start with our free plan to see if Multi Lingo AI is right for them.

faqs.question: Is my learning data private?
faqs.answer: Yes! Your privacy is important to us. All conversation data is encrypted and you maintain full control over your learning information.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Choose your preferred sign-in method to continue.
login.terms_note: By signing in you agree to our
login.not_available: This sign-in method isn't available yet — check back soon!

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Got questions about European Portuguese? Our flock is here to help you soar.
contact.faq_q1: How quickly will I get a reply?
contact.faq_a1: We usually reply within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, use WhatsApp for fastest response.
contact.faq_q2: Do you offer custom plans for schools?
contact.faq_a2: Yes! We have special educational packages for schools and language institutes. Send us a message to discuss your needs.
contact.faq_a3: Absolutely! We love hearing user suggestions. Many of our best features came directly from user requests.
contact.faq_q4: Is Multi Lingo AI really 100% remote?
contact.faq_a4: Yes! We are a fully distributed team working from beaches, cafes and co-working spaces around the world. No office, no dress code, just great language learning.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_text: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this website.
terms.section2_text: Permission is granted to temporarily view the materials on this website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.
terms.section3_text: The materials on this website are provided on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaim and negate all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.section4_text: In no event shall we be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on this website.
terms.section5_text: We may revise these terms of service for our website at any time without notice. By using this website, you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_text: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and any other information you voluntarily provide when using our website.
privacy.section2_text: Any information we collect may be used to personalize your experience, improve our website, send periodic emails, or administer contests, promotions, surveys or other site features.
privacy.section3_text: This website may use cookies to enhance user experience. Your web browser places cookies on your hard drive for record-keeping purposes and sometimes to track information about you. You may choose to set your browser to refuse cookies.
privacy.section4_text: We adopt appropriate data collection, storage and processing practices and security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction of your personal information stored on our site.
privacy.section5_text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal identification information to others. We may share generic aggregated demographic information not linked to any personal identification information regarding visitors and users with our business partners and advertisers.
privacy.section6_text: We have the discretion to update this privacy policy at any time. When we do, we will revise the updated date at the bottom of this page. You acknowledge and agree that it is your responsibility to review this privacy policy periodically and become aware of modifications.

dashboard.welcome_subtitle: Welcome back to your language hub
dashboard.not_implemented: This feature is coming soon — stay tuned!
dashboard.translator_desc: Instantly translate text between any two languages with context-aware AI.
dashboard.dictionary_desc: Look up words, meanings, examples, and conjugations in any language.
dashboard.grammar_desc: Check and correct your grammar, get explanations and writing tips.
dashboard.ai_tutor_desc: Chat with an AI language tutor for practice, corrections, and feedback.
dashboard.real_person_tutor_desc: Book a live session with a certified native-speaker tutor.
dashboard.voice_practice_desc: Record yourself speaking and get AI-powered pronunciation feedback.
dashboard.story_generator_desc: Read and listen to AI-generated stories tailored to your level.
dashboard.history_culture_desc: Explore the history, customs, and culture behind the language you're learning.
dashboard.challenges_desc: Test your skills with mini-games, quizzes, and daily language challenges.
dashboard.exam_training_desc: Prepare for official language certification exams.
dashboard.professional_tools_desc: Create CVs, resumes, emails and professional documents in Portuguese with a formal or casual tone.
